sentences.arabic: قَضَى الطِّفْلُ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً فِي لَعِبِ الْأَلْعَابِ الْإِلِكْتَرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je provelo duge sate igrajući elektronske igrice.
sentences.translationEn: The child spent long hours playing electronic games.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَتْهُ الْأُمُّ بِالْخُرُوجِ إِلَى الْحَدِيقَةِ لِتَنَفُّسِ الْهَوَاءِ النَّقِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Majka mu je savjetovala da izađe u park kako bi udisao svjež zrak.
sentences.translationEn: The mother advised him to go out to the garden to breathe fresh air.

sentences.arabic: تَقْلِيلُ وَقْتِ الشَّاشَةِ يُحَسِّنُ الصِّحَّةَ النَّفْسِيَّةَ وَالْجَسَدِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Smanjenje vremena ispred ekrana poboljšava psihičko i fizičko zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Reducing screen time improves mental and physical health.
